channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Labour ministers pressure Keir Starmer to resign amid mounting internal dissent
item.description: Keir Starmer's leadership is facing a severe crisis as multiple Labour Cabinet ministers, led by Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood, have reportedly urged him to resign. More than seventy Labour MPs have ...

item.title: ANC to discuss court-ordered impeachment proceedings against President Ramaphosa
item.description: South Africa’s ruling party, the African National Congress (ANC), is calling a special meeting of its National Executive Committee on Tuesday evening following a recent court decision that revived imp...

item.title: How Karen Njamu’s conduct reflects deeper issues within UDA and Kenyan politics
item.description: The article argues that Senator Karen Njamu’s repeated controversies illustrate a broader problem within UDA: the tolerance of celebrity‑driven, scandal‑prone politicians at the expense of party disci...

item.title: APC screens 24 Enugu assembly aspirants ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: For Enugu State, the All Progressives Congress (APC) don carry matter serious as dem don screen all 24 people wey wan contest for Enugu State House of Assembly for 2027 elections. Lucky Porki, wey be ...

item.title: Trump to Address Taiwan Arms Sales in Meeting with Xi Jinping Amid U.S.-China Tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump announced he plans to discuss U.S. arms sales to Taiwan with Chinese President Xi Jinping during a summit in Beijing. This announcement has stirred concerns over potentially und...

item.title: California Mayor Faces Federal Charges Over Alleged Chinese Espionage
item.description: The mayor of a city in California has been formally charged with acting as an agent for the Chinese government, according to authorities. The case has drawn national attention because it involves alle...

item.title: Green Party leader Zack Polanski admits failing to pay council tax on houseboat amid electoral registration inquiry
item.description: Zack Polanski, leader of the Green Party and member of the London Assembly, has admitted that he did not pay council tax while residing on a houseboat in east London. Polanski apologised for what he d...

item.title: West Asia tensions pose challenges for upcoming BRICS foreign ministers’ meeting
item.description: Differences between Iran and the UAE over recent attacks on energy infrastructure have emerged as a significant concern ahead of the BRICS foreign ministers’ meeting in India scheduled for May 14-15, ...

item.title: The 1916 Detroit Electric Model 57 Brougham and Early Electric Luxury Cars
item.description: The 1916 Detroit Electric Model 57 Brougham represents a refined chapter in early automotive history, showcasing how electric vehicles once stood at the forefront of innovation and luxury. Built on a ...

item.title: Trump comments on legal protections during White House dinner spark debate among analysts
item.description: During a dinner event at the White House on May 11, 2026, President Donald Trump delivered a brief speech that left political analysts and attendees surprised. Speaking to a crowd that included Vice P...

item.title: Zenith Bank opens first branch in WAEMU, aiming to boost Nigeria-Francophone financial ties
item.description: Zenith Bank, one of Nigeria’s top lenders with a $22.4 billion balance sheet, officially opened its first subsidiary in Abidjan on 29 April, marking its entry into the West African Economic and Moneta...

item.title: FIFA experts say limited preparation fit reduce set-piece impact for 2026 World Cup
item.description: FIFA Technical Study Group (TSG) don talk say although set-piece tactics don become very important for club football, e no too likely say e go dominate play style for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Dem yarn...

item.title: Bendigo Weather Update for Today
item.description: The article intended to provide readers with an overview of the weather conditions expected in Bendigo today. Unfortunately, the content could not be accessed due to the website blocking automated tra...

item.title: Kwara State Employs 10 Doctors and 150 Nurses to Strengthen Healthcare Services
item.description: Kwara State Government don complete recruitment of 10 medical doctors and 150 nurses and midwives as part of effort to improve healthcare services across the state. According to statement from the Kwa...

item.title: Steve Waugh backs emerging European cricket league to grow the game beyond traditional markets
item.description: Former Australian cricket captain Steve Waugh is turning his attention to developing the sport in Europe, backing a new cricket league aimed at expanding the game beyond its traditional strongholds. K...

item.title: ECI to Expand Electoral Roll Revision to Remaining 22 States and UTs Under Phase III of SIR
item.description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) is preparing to initiate Phase III of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls in the coming days, aiming to cover the remaining 22 States and Uni...

item.title: India to Introduce Joint Military Doctrines for Improved ISR and Targeting
item.description: India is preparing to release two new military doctrines focused on intelligence, surveillance, reconnaissance (ISR), and targeting to strengthen integration among its armed forces and speed up decisi...

item.title: Congress Faces Internal Strains Over Kerala CM Selection After Election Win
item.description: Following the recent Kerala Assembly elections in 2026, the Congress party finds itself in a political dilemma despite securing a strong mandate. The central leadership’s indecision over the chief min...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Issues 24-Hour Rain and Wind Advisory for Multiple Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (Kenya Met) has issued a weather advisory covering the next 24 hours, from 9:00 PM tonight to 9:00 PM tomorrow, Tuesday, May 12, 2026. The forecast predicts varied ...

item.title: PM Modi and key leaders reach Guwahati for NDA government swearing-in
item.description: The Prime Minister of India, Shri Narendra Modi, along with other prominent dignitaries, arrived in Guwahati for the swearing-in ceremony of the newly elected NDA government. The event marks the comme...
